title: Create: Hex Casting
description: Modpack from the Create: Hexcasting let's play series
body:
# Create: Hexcasting

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BH-4o-8hplI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

**The modpack from my YouTube series!**

All mods will be downloaded from Modrinth. Credit to [Visual Traveler's Titles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/visual-travelers-titles) on curseforge, which is included using an override.

Includes optional mods meant for servers. For singleplayer, feel free to keep these unchecked.

<hr>

**Added mods**

These are mods added since the Episode 1 opening credits.

- [HexDebug](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexdebug)
- [Complex Hex](https://modrinth.com/mod/complex-hex)
- [Hexxy Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexsky)

**Disabled mods**

These are mods that are mentioned in the Episode 1 intro but have since been (temporarily?) disabled due to issues.

| mod | reason |
|---|---|
| [Create: Interactive](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactive) | Breaks non-interactive contraptions by not converting chests and barrels to contraption storage. The new interactive contraptions are too laggy to make every contraption interactive. |
| [Hexal](https://modrinth.com/mod/hexal) | Unmaintained |
| [MoreIotas](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreiotas) | Unmaintained |
| [HexTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/hextweaks) | [Crashes outside of development environment](https://discord.com/channels/936370934292549712/1011455473528098857/1295397402769100810) and when patched [still crashes on world load in combination with Hexxy Dimensions](https://github.com/walksanatora/HexTweaks/issues/24) |
| [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/mod/itemswapper) | [Conflicts with invMove](https://github.com/tr7zw/ItemSwapper/issues/160) |
| [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes) | Crashes my game periodically ever since I tamed my wolf ?? |
